name: Asparagus Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the asparagus in a shallow dish and set aside.
2. In a blender, combine 1 1/2 cups tomato juice, 1/3 cup vinegar, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, sugar substitute to equal 1 tablespoon sugar, 1/4 teaspoon paprika, chopped onion, chopped parsley, and dill. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the asparagus and marinate for 1 hour, stirring occasionally. After marinating, drain any excess liquid from the asparagus.
4. Arrange the drained asparagus on lettuce leaves.
5. Garnish with strips of pimento, if desired, and any remaining marinade.
